name: Claude Dev (alindesign)
initializeCommand: sh -c '[ "$(uname)" != Darwin ] || { mkdir -p "$HOME/.claude" && security find-generic-password -s "Claude Code-credentials" -w 2>/dev/null > "$HOME/.claude/.credentials.json" && chmod 600 "$HOME/.claude/.credentials.json"; } || true'
postCreateCommand: bash -c 'gn="${templateOption:gitUserName}"; ge="${templateOption:gitUserEmail}"; [ -n "$gn" ] && git config --global user.name "$gn"; [ -n "$ge" ] && git config --global user.email "$ge"; claude --version && node --version'
